original_contract.client_sync: PacketAspectPool sent after every awarded point

port_before: Warp and Eldritch grantResearch paths changed server persistent aspect-pool NBT but only synchronized research/warp state, leaving the client aspect pool stale.
port_after: Both production paths delegate to TC4WarpResearchGrant.grantAndSync, which applies the exact primal award roll and sends one aggregate AspectKnowledgeSyncPacket after the batch.
network_adaptation: One aggregate 1.19.2 pool packet replaces TC4's one PacketAspectPool per point while preserving the final client-visible pool.
